zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Trenance於大約1250年出生。她於1272年之前與Richard De Trenance在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Trenance于大约1250年出生。她于1272年之前与Richard De Trenance在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Trenance was born about 1250. She married Richard De Trenance before 1272, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Trenance est née environ 1250. Elle a épousé Richard De Trenance avant 1272, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Trenance wurde um 1250 geboren. Sie hat vor 1272 in Europa Richard De Trenance geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Trenance è nata il circa 1250. Lei sposato Richard De Trenance prima del 1272, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Trenanceは約1250年に生まれた。1272年以前にヨーロッパでRichard De Trenanceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Trenance(은)는 대략 1250년 태어났다. 그녀는 1272년 이전 우럽에서 Richard De Trenance(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Trenance nasceu aproximadamente 1250. Ela casou-se com Richard De Trenance antes 1272, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Trenance родилась около 1250 г. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard De Trenance перед 1272 г. в местности Европа. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard de Trenance nació aproximadamente 1250. Se casó con Richard De Trenance antes de 1272, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
